title: Track + verify external reuse/adoption events
context: Sustainability depends on demonstrable external reuse. The project tracks verifiable reuse events (citations, forks building on the catalog, issues/PRs referencing it) and, on the first confirmed research consumer, flips relevant tasks to verifiedNeed: true. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Track and verify external reuse/adoption events and record them with verifiable evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: 3+ verifiable external reuse events recorded (citation, fork building on the catalog, or issue/PR referencing it); each with verifiable evidence.
On the first confirmed research consumer, relevant tasks flip verifiedNeed: true with requestor set.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: REUSE.md (plus outcomes/ entries) recording verified external reuse events.
